title: Taylors Eye Witness Maple Cake Server – Stainless Steel Dessert & Pie Server with Polished Finish & Smooth Balanced Handle. Perfect for Lifting, Slicing & Serving Cakes & Pastries. Dishwasher Safe
features: PREMIUM MAPLE CAKE SERVER – Serving cakes & desserts can quickly become messy when using tools that lack rigidity or the proper blade profile. This 22.7cm Taylor's Eye Witness Maple cake server features a sturdy 2mm handle gauge & a polished 4.7cm × 11cm serving blade designed for clean lifting, smooth slicing & precise portion control. Its refined shape ensures structural stability while gliding easily beneath cakes, tarts or pastries, making dessert service elegant, controlled & effortless.

FINE POLISHED FINISH TYPE 430 STAINLESS STEEL – Low-grade cutlery can tarnish, bend or lose its shine quickly, especially with frequent use. Each piece in the Taylor's Eye Witness Maple collection is crafted from durable Type 430 stainless steel with a fine polished finish that resists staining, corrosion & wear. The smooth, mirror-like surface enhances both hygiene & appearance. Built for reliability, this cutlery delivers consistent performance across all table settings & dining occasions.

SIMPLE, UNDERSTATED DESIGN, FIT FOR ANY TABLE SETTING – Cutlery that overwhelms a table can disrupt the aesthetic, while overly delicate designs lack versatility. The Maple range offers a clean, understated silhouette that complements both contemporary & traditional décor. Its refined lines, subtle contours & well-balanced proportions integrate seamlessly with every style of dinnerware, making it suitable for casual meals, formal dining, parties & everyday home use.

DISHWASHER-SAFE & WITH 5-YEAR GUARANTEE – Busy households need cutlery that withstands frequent washing without dulling, rusting or weakening over time. All Maple items are dishwasher safe for quick, hygienic cleaning. At Taylor's Eye Witness, we’re so confident in the quality of our product that any item found compromised will be replaced without charge, subject to normal household use. We've been making kitchen tools for over 150 years & pride ourselves on the reliability of our products.

A PERFECT GIFT FOR FOOD LOVERS & HOME COOKS – Choosing a practical yet thoughtful gift can be challenging, especially for those who enjoy hosting or cooking. The Maple collection’s elegant design, durable stainless steel construction & everyday functionality make it an ideal present for food lovers, new homeowners, students, newlyweds or anyone upgrading their tableware. Built to offer lasting value, table cutlery becomes a well-used & well-appreciated addition to any kitchen or dining setup.
description: Precision-Crafted Stainless Steel Cutlery for Everyday Dining Upgrade your table essentials with the Taylors Eye Witness Maple Collection, a refined range of stainless steel utensils designed for effortless everyday use. Whether you’re slicing meats with the dinner knives, lifting cake slices cleanly, serving vegetables with the deep-bowled spoon, or pouring sauces with the balanced ladle, every piece is engineered for smooth, controlled performance. The finely serrated blades, weighted handles & polished finish ensure comfort, precision & lasting durability in busy kitchens. Elegant, Understated Design to Suit Any Table Setting Crafted from polished Type 430 stainless steel, this cutlery range maintains a bright, mirror-like finish that resists staining, bending & dulling over time. The clean, minimalist silhouette blends seamlessly with modern & traditional dinnerware, making it ideal for family meals, dinner parties, festive gatherings or everyday dining. From serving spoons to dinner knives, each utensil is designed to look good on any table while delivering dependable functionality meal after meal. Dishwasher Safe, Long-Lasting & Gift-Ready Kitchen Essentials Perfect for practical homes, every piece in the Maple Collection is fully dishwasher safe, ensuring easy cleaning without compromising quality. Built for long-term use & backed by a 25-year guarantee, this collection offers outstanding reliability for households, students, new homeowners & food enthusiasts. Whether you're replacing old cutlery or gifting stylish kitchen tools, this versatile set—featuring table knives, a cake server, a serving spoon & a sauce ladle—brings lasting value to any kitchen.
